lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਪਚੰਨਿ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: onaa sach na bhaavee dukh hee maeh pachan |18|
lines.english: They do not love the Truth - they are consumed by their pain. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਚੇ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਓਥੈ ਕੂੜੇ ਨਾ ਟਿਕੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahu sache vanajaare othai koorre naa ttikan |
lines.english: True is the Banker, and True are His traders. The false ones cannot remain there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲਾ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mailaa jag firai mar jamai vaaro vaar |
lines.english: The world wanders around in the filth of egotism; it dies, and is re-born, over and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: peiai kirat kamaavanaa koe na mettanahaar |19|
lines.english: He acts in accordance with the karma of his past actions, which no one can erase. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਤਾ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: santaa sangat mil rahai taa sach lagai piaar |
lines.english: But if he joins the Society of the Saints, then he comes to embrace love for the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਹੈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore pooree mat hai ahinis naam dhiaae |
lines.english: The Teachings of the Perfect Guru are perfect; meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sach salaahee sach man dar sachai sachiaar |20|
lines.english: Praising the True Lord with a truthful mind, he becomes true in the Court of the True Lord. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਵਡ ਰੋਗੁ ਹੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਇ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa vadd rog hai vichahu tthaak rahaae |21|
lines.english: Egotism and self-conceit are terrible diseases; tranquility and stillness come from within. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur saalaahee aapanaa niv niv laagaa paae |
lines.english: I praise my Guru; bowing down to Him again and again, I fall at His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਉਪੀ ਆਗੈ ਧਰੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: tan man saupee aagai dharee vichahu aap gavaae |22|
lines.english: I place my body and mind in offering unto Him, eradicating self-conceit from within. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿੰਚੋਤਾਣਿ ਵਿਗੁਚੀਐ ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khinchotaan vigucheeai ekas siau liv laae |
lines.english: Indecision leads to ruin; focus your attention on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਛਡਿ ਤੂ ਤਾ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa chhadd too taa sach rahai samaae |23|
lines.english: Renounce egotism and self-conceit, and remain merged in Truth. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਿ ਭਾਇਰਾ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਗੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur no mile si bhaaeiraa sachai sabad lagan |
lines.english: Those who meet with the True Guru are my Siblings of Destiny; they are committed to the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਾਈ ਸੇ ਸਜਣਾ ਜੋ ਸਚਾ ਸੇਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: se bhaaee se sajanaa jo sachaa sevan |
lines.english: They are my Siblings of Destiny, and they are my friends, who serve the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਦਿਸੰਨਿ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: sach mile se na vichhurreh dar sachai disan |24|
lines.english: Those who merge with the True Lord shall not be separated again; they are judged to be True in the Court of the Lord. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਵਿਕਣਿ ਪਲੑਰਨਿ ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਸਾਝ ਕਰੰਨੑਿ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: avagan vikan palaran gun kee saajh karana |25|
lines.english: They sell off their sins and demerits like straw, and enter into the partnership of virtue. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਸਾਝ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: gun kee saajh sukh aoopajai sachee bhagat karen |
lines.english: In the partnership of virtue, peace wells up, and they perform true devotional worship service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਇਨਾ ਰੁਪਾ ਪਾਪ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਚੀਐ ਚਲੈ ਨ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sueinaa rupaa paap kar kar sancheeai chalai na chaladiaa naal |
lines.english: Gold and silver may be earned by committing sins, but they will not go with you when you die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਣੰਜਹਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਏਨਿ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: sach vananjeh gurasabad siau laahaa naam len |26|
lines.english: They deal in Truth, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and they earn the profit of the Naam. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਸੀ ਸਭ ਮੁਠੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: vin naavai naal na chalasee sabh mutthee jamakaal |27|
lines.english: Nothing will go with you in the end, except the Name; all are plundered by the Messenger of Death. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਤੋਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਹੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa tosaa har naam hai hiradai rakhahu samaal |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the nourishment of the mind; cherish it, and preserve it carefully within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਖਰਚੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: ehu kharach akhutt hai guramukh nibahai naal |28|
lines.english: This nourishment is inexhaustible; it is always with the Gurmukhs. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੂਲਹੁ ਭੁਲਿਆ ਜਾਸਹਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: e man moolahu bhuliaa jaaseh pat gavaae |
lines.english: O mind, if you forget the Primal Lord, you shall depart, having lost your honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: eihu jagat mohi doojai viaapiaa guramatee sach dhiaae |29|
lines.english: This world is engrossed in the love of duality; follow the Guru's Teachings, and meditate on the True Lord. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਲਿਖਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee keemat naa pavai har jas likhan na jaae |
lines.english: The Lord's value cannot be estimated; the Lord's Praises cannot be written down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad man tan rapai har siau rahai samaae |30|
lines.english: When one's mind and body are attuned to the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one remains merged in the Lord. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਰੰਗੁਲਾ ਰੰਗੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so sahu meraa rangulaa range sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: My Husband Lord is playful; He has imbued me with His Love, with natural ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਤਾ ਚੜੈ ਜਾ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: kaaman rang taa charrai jaa pir kai ank samaae |31|
lines.english: The soul-bride is imbued with His Love, when her Husband Lord merges her into His Being. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਖਾਨਿ ਖਰਚਨਿ ਨ ਨਿਖੁਟਈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਵੰਨਿ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: antar nav nidh naam hai khaan kharachan na nikhuttee har gun sehaj ravan |32|
lines.english: The nine treasures of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are deep within the nucleus of the self; consuming them, they are still never exhausted. Chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, with natural ease. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਰੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੇ ਭੀ ਮਿਲਨਿ ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: chiree vichhune bhee milan jo satigur sevan |
lines.english: Even those who have been separated for so very long, are reunited with Him, when they serve the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਇ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਨਾ ਮਰਹਿ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਦੁਖ ਸਹੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa oe janameh naa mareh naa oe dukh sahan |
lines.english: They are not born, and they do not die; they do not suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਕੇਲ ਕਰੰਨਿ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare har siau kel karan |33|
lines.english: Those who are protected by the Guru are saved. They celebrate with the Lord. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਲਹੰਨਿ ॥੩੪॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh virale jaaneeeh naanak sach lahan |34|1|3|
lines.english: In this world, only a rare few are known, O Nanak, to have obtained the True Lord. ||34||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਮਿਲੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਜਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਮਿਲੇ ਰਹੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: sajan mile na vichhurreh ji anadin mile rahan |
lines.english: Those who are united with the Lord, the True Friend, are not separated again; night and day, they remain blended with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਸੂਖਮੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jee sookham agam hai kit bidh miliaa jaae |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is subtle and inaccessible; how can we ever meet Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Soohee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad bhram katteeai achint vasai man aae |1|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, doubt is dispelled, and the Carefree Lord comes to abide in the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har har naam japan |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.
